MY_DOCS.title: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
MY_DOCS.summary: Haemoglobin 11.2 g/dL (low), WBC normal, platelets normal. Mild anaemia flagged.

MY_DOCS.title: Metformin + Amlodipine
MY_DOCS.summary: Metformin 500mg twice daily, Amlodipine 5mg once daily. Review in 4 weeks.

MY_DOCS.title: HbA1c & Lipid Profile
MY_DOCS.summary: HbA1c 7.4% (controlled). LDL 118 mg/dL — borderline. Follow-up recommended.

MY_DOCS.title: Chest X-Ray — PA View
MY_DOCS.summary: No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality. Lungs clear. Heart size normal.

MY_DOCS.title: Apollo Hospital Discharge Summary
MY_DOCS.summary: Admitted for pyrexia of unknown origin. Discharged after 3 days. Follow-up in 2 weeks.

MY_DOCS.title: Apollo Diagnostics Invoice
MY_DOCS.summary: CBC + HbA1c + Lipid Profile. Total: Rs.1,850. Insurance claim filed.

ravi.title: Thyroid Function Test (TFT)
ravi.summary: TSH 5.2 mIU/L (slightly elevated). T3/T4 normal. Repeat in 3 months.

ravi.title: Levothyroxine 50mcg
ravi.summary: Levothyroxine 50mcg once daily on empty stomach. Review after 6 weeks.

ravi.title: Ultrasound Abdomen
ravi.summary: Liver, spleen, kidneys normal. No focal lesions. Mild hepatomegaly noted.

sharma.title: Discharge Summary — KIMS
sharma.summary: Procedure: Right knee arthroscopy. Discharged Day 2. Physiotherapy advised.

sharma.title: Post-op Medications
sharma.summary: Cefixime 200mg BD 5 days, Pantop 40mg OD, Aceclofenac SOS.

priya.title: Haemogram + Iron Studies
priya.summary: Iron 42 mcg/dL (low), Ferritin 6 ng/mL (low). Iron deficiency anaemia confirmed.

priya.title: Iron Sucrose + Folic Acid
priya.summary: Ferrous sulphate 325mg TDS, Folic acid 5mg OD. Dietary guidance given.

priya.title: Vijaya Diagnostics Invoice
priya.summary: Haemogram + Iron studies + Ferritin. Total: Rs.1,200.
